hero.title: Ditch the spreadsheets and actually control your services
hero.subtitle: I know how much it hurts to drop the ball on a scheduled visit. Proto groups your clients, scheduling, work orders, and collections in one clean flow.
hero.panelTitle: Track everything coming in, going out, and needing attention
hero.panelSubtitle: Take one glance and know instantly: what's scheduled today, who's out on the field, and who still owes you money.
hero.mockPipelineSubtitle: From scheduled visits to completed jobs

mockFocusItems.clients: Get the full client history instantly
mockFocusItems.schedule: See schedule, visits, and work orders working together
mockFocusItems.collections: No more parallel spreadsheets just to bill someone

problem.title: Keeping the whole operation in your head gets expensive (and stressful)
problem.subtitle: You're already working hard. The real problem is having your schedule right here, your billing over there, and a client completely lost in the middle.

recurring.title: You're missing recurring revenue
recurring.body: Ever forgot to check back on a monthly client? When there's no clear calendar, maintenance visits slip away, and revenue goes down the drain.

orders.title: Work orders don't talk to each other
orders.body: The team does the work, but where is the record? When the important stuff isn't written down, it becomes a guessing game between you and the client.

collections.title: Collections become an afterthought
collections.body: If you have to open another app or spreadsheet just to see who paid, cash flow slows down. It gets impossible to measure.

features.title: The basics done right, with zero useless complexity
features.subtitle: I built Proto thinking of the small business owner. No bureaucratic, slow enterprise software over here.

clients.title: Clients that matter
clients.body: Keep the people who pay the bills together. Phones, addresses, and a full track record of what you've done for them.

schedule.title: Smart scheduling
schedule.body: Book field visits without double-booking. Focus on recurring appointments and let the system warn you about deadlines.

orders.title: Effortless Work Orders
orders.body: Note what happened during the visit. Stop asking in the company chat what part was replaced last time.

finance.title: Finance without the panic
finance.body: Look at it and understand it. Know your active invoices, what you should have collected by now, and the cash in your pocket.

reports.title: The pulse of your business
reports.body: A quick summary of how much you're doing out there, and how much of it is actually turning into profit.

segments.title: Small teams living out in the field
segments.subtitle: Designed for 1 to 10 people operating through visits, providing on-demand services, or dealing with monthly contracts.

steps.title: Three steps and you'll see the value

clients.title: Drop your clients in
clients.body: Forget the phone's address book. Set up your client base once and never struggle to find their info again.

visits.title: Put the visits on the board
visits.body: Just plug your folks on the map. Track the execution and turn everything into dead-simple Work Orders.

collections.title: Close the deal quickly
collections.body: Job done? Great. The Work Order itself turns into an invoice to collect. End-to-end control, no tears involved.

valueBand.title: Don't reinvent the wheel. Just let it spin smoother.

items.label: All the info ties together on one screen
The team knows exactly what to do when they arrive
You just monitor the whole thing from above

pricingPreview.title: No annoying surprises at the end of the month
pricingPreview.subtitle: I want you to try it, feel the relief in your operations, and only pay if you genuinely believe it's worth it.

founders.name: Founding Member
founders.description: If you jump in early, you get special pricing and help me shape what comes next.

operation.name: Fluid Operation
operation.description: For those who know they need to get their house in order. Full operating cycle and finance already plugged in.

team.name: Full Team
team.description: Perfect if you've outgrown the early limits and need to put more techs in the field pulling their weight.
highlights: Audit logs on who did what

pricingPage.title: Pick how you want to change your routine
pricingPage.subtitle: Let's not make pricing a headache. Step in slowly, watch your client flow improve, and upgrade only when you feel like it.

decisionCards.title: Simplify immediately
decisionCards.body: We jump straight from pain points to quick fixes. I'd rather give you airtight Work Orders tomorrow than upsell you magic features a year from now.

decisionCards.title: It's all about value
decisionCards.body: If you normally jot your schedule down on paper, and now see your whole day smoothly routed, it pays for itself. Plain and simple.

decisionCards.title: Shift gears later
decisionCards.body: As you notice fewer forgotten follow-ups, the need for the Full Team plan will naturally pop up when the time is right.

pricingPage.notesTitle: Why Proto plays it straight with you
notes: No traps. The goal here is to fix your daily mess, not to force you into buying modules you'll never touch.
I don't want your credit card held hostage. Start free. Once your operations can't live without it, we go official.
If you hit any snags during your first week, talk to me. I'll personally help you out on WhatsApp to get your business soaring.

comparison.title: What you get at every step
comparison.subtitle: I won't complicate this. Check the exact differences right here without squinting.

rows.label: Someone to hold your hand
rows.team: You skip the line on any ticket

pricingPage.faqTitle: What folks usually ask me before signing up

who.question: Does Proto actually work for my kind of business?
who.answer: It's built for almost any small company where people have to head out to do the service (maintenance, installations) or handle recurring client visits.

erp.question: Is this going to turn into a giant system for taxes, heavy inventory, and complex accounting?
erp.answer: Nope. My motto is to focus purely on the battlefield: a happy Client, a finished Visit, a closed Work Order, and the Cash in the bank. I leave the bureaucracy to other tools.

install.question: Do I need to install this on everybody's computer?
install.answer: Not at all, it runs straight from your browser. You can access it on your phone while driving to the client, or on your office computer, nice and chill.

team.question: It's just me and one person in finance. Is it worth it?
team.answer: It's designed exactly for that! Small teams are the ones who try to keep everything in their heads and end up hurting. Starting with a clean slate is so much better.

finalCta.title: Grab the reins of your business right now
finalCta.body: Take that feeling of leaving everything neatly tied up for tomorrow and use Proto to actually put it into practice without suffering.
finalCta.secondaryCta: I just want to sign in

footer.copy: Proto. Running real services, for people who like to see it happen.
